title: Synergy: In the context of mergers, synergy can be defined as...
summary: Evaluate the concept of synergy where the combined value of firms exceeds their individual values.
prompt: In the context of mergers, synergy can be defined as the situation where 2 + 2 = 5.
solution: Synergy refers to the concept that the combined value of two firms working together can exceed the sum of their individual values.
